caption: A woman with her hair in a bun and small braids is seated in a studio setting, facing toward the left. She wears a dark green t-shirt with a red and white circular logo on the chest. Positioned in front of her is a professional black microphone on a stand. Behind her is a black backdrop featuring white text that includes "SS TALK 101", "It's A Unique Hustle", "PODCAST", and "About It!". To her left, a framed picture hangs on a white wall. In the foreground, a dark table holds two clear glasses with liquid. Small red and white logos, one reading "BOY TALK 101", appear as overlays on the screen. Across the sequence of frames, the woman remains in a similar seated position, slightly shifting her head and gaze while maintaining a neutral expression, as the camera angle remains static.
